title: The VAT refund under the Reciprocity Declaration between Croatia and Turkey
bodyHtml: The letter received from the Ministry of Trade states that as of May 1, 2014, the "VAT General Application Communiqué" was published in the Official Gazette numbered 28983 and dated April 26, 2014. Accordingly, it is possible for exhibitors of fairs, exhibitions, and bazaars who do not have residence, workplace, or legal headquarters in Turkey and who solely purchase goods and services related to these activities to be refunded the VAT they paid in Turkey, provided that mutual agreements are made with relevant countries. Within this framework, it is stated that Reciprocity Declarations have been signed between Croatia and Turkey, and as of April 10, 2023, exhibitors of fairs, exhibitions, and bazaars who do not have residence, workplace, or legal and business centers in Croatia and who solely purchase goods and services related to these activities can obtain a VAT refund in Croatia for the VAT they paid in that country.
